gradeDescription: A = I excelled at everything I did today!
noteworthyComments:
Today at school I worked super hard on my door manners! We practiced waiting politely at door thresholds both inside and outside. I learned to pause, stay calm, and move through only when invited. I’m getting really good at controlling my excitement!

After all that focus, we went outside to soak up the sunshine and play with my friends. It was the perfect way to end the day! I loved playing with Ruby
